title: Robbot's | Adminpanel
description: A simple admin panel for player and server management. Also includes a chat filter.
body:
Robbot's Admin Panel

Compatible with version 1.21+.

A simple admin panel for muting, banning, and kicking players, chat filter, and checking player inventories.

This plugin is still in development!

How to Use:

Command: /admin
You must have the permission **robbotadminpanel.admin** or be OP.

Command: /rbaddchatfilter ""
You must have the permission **robbotadminpanel.chatfilter** or be OP.

If you want your staff to have access to everything without giving them OP, use the permission **robbotadminpanel.***.
